name: Henan Xinye Textile Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Xinye Textile Co., Ltd. produces and sells fabric yarns and apparel fabrics in China. Its products include pure cotton and blended yarns and fabrics, yarn dyed fabrics, and home textiles. The company also exports its products to 12 countries and regions, such as the United States, the European Union, Japan, South Korea, and Hong Kong. Henan Xinye Textile Co., Ltd. is based in Xinyang, China.
